normalized_definitions.material_purity_specification: The detailed specification of the material's purity, covering the specific grade, purity percentage, synthesis method of elemental components, and classification regarding residual or trace elements (such as carbon and nitrogen), which together influence baseline inclusion and defect levels.

normalized_definitions.unified_numbering_system_designation: The standard Unified Numbering System (UNS) code used to identify and categorize the specific alloy composition.

normalized_definitions.material_product_form: The manufactured physical shape or geometry of the raw base material prior to any conditioning or further processing, such as sheet, plate, bar, or wire.
